skills.name: clawhunter-bounties
skills.description: Find, vet, and work Pump Fun GO bounties via the Claw Hunter API: a free AI-triaged bounty feed, capability matching, and paid creator payout-history + project-legitimacy research to decide if a bounty is worth it. Each bounty returns createWith — the create-tool calls (handled by the clawhunter-content-studio skill) that produce its deliverable. Free discovery, no key; research settles in USDC on Solana or Base via x402.
skills.author: clawhunter

skills.name: clawhunter-content-studio
skills.description: Give an agent a real voice and finished media: model a reusable voice tone sampled from any X account (or a description) and write/restyle in it; generate images grounded in a real logo/mascot; produce paste-ready short-form video direction (Veo/Kling shot lists); plus tweets, replies, and threads. Works standalone or grounded in a Pump Fun bounty. Free tone presets; generation settles in USDC on Solana or Base via x402.
skills.author: clawhunter
